# UI Inspection Report: Shopping Cart Feature

**Scenario**: Add product to shopping cart and verify presence in cart

**Date**: Generated by UI Inspector Agent

---

## Preconditions

- Login required: "standard_user" (credentials in `SauceDemoUsers` TestData)
- Target: https://www.saucedemo.com/

---

## Existing Page Objects to Reuse

| Page Object | Location | Relevant Methods | Notes |
|------------|----------|------------------|-------|
| `SauceLoginPage` | `Pages/SauceDemo/SauceLoginPage.cs` | `Open()`, `Login(username, password)` | Verified; can reach inventory page |
| `SauceInventoryPage` | `Pages/SauceDemo/SauceInventoryPage.cs` | `GetPageTitle()` | Verified; currently minimal — needs extension |
| `BasePage` | `Core/BasePages.cs` | `WaitUntilVisible()`, `WaitUntilClickable()`, `WaitUntilTextExistsInPage()` | Verified; provides wait infrastructure |

---

## Missing Page Objects

- **Inventory cart operations** — SauceInventoryPage needs functionality to interact with products
- **Shopping cart page** — New Page Object required to represent cart state and operations

---

## Required User Actions

1. **Find product by name** on inventory page (visible text: "Sauce Labs Backpack")
2. **Click Add to Cart button** for the found product
3. **Navigate to shopping cart** via cart link
4. **Verify product presence** in cart by name

---

## Locator Candidates

| Element | Preferred Locator | Alternative Locator | Stability | Source |
|---------|------------------|---------------------|-----------|--------|
| Product item container | `[data-test='inventory-item']` | `.inventory_item` | **Verified** | inventory-backpack-item.html |
| Product name (Inventory) | `[data-test='inventory-item-name']` | `.inventory_item_name` | **Verified** | inventory-backpack-item.html |
| Add to Cart button | `[data-test='add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack']` | `#add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack` | **Verified** | inventory-backpack-add-button.html |
| Shopping cart link | `[data-test='shopping-cart-link']` | `.shopping_cart_link` | **Verified** | shopping-cart-link.html |
| Cart item container | `[data-test='inventory-item']` | `.cart_item` | **Verified** | cart-item.html |
| Product name (Cart) | `[data-test='inventory-item-name']` | `.inventory_item_name` | **Verified** | cart-item-name.html |
| Cart item quantity | `[data-test='item-quantity']` | `.cart_quantity` | **Verified** | cart-item.html |
| Remove button | `[data-test='remove-sauce-labs-backpack']` | `#remove-sauce-labs-backpack` | **Verified** | cart-item.html |

---

## Wait Strategy Requirements

| Action | Wait Needed | Condition | Notes |
|--------|-------------|-----------|-------|
| Locate product item | Yes | Product element visible in inventory | Use `WaitUntilVisible()` |
| Click Add to Cart | Yes | Button is clickable | Use `WaitUntilClickable()` |
| Navigate to cart | Yes | Cart page loaded with items | Use `WaitUntilVisible()` on cart item |
| Verify product in cart | Yes | Product name visible in cart list | May need custom text-based wait |

---

## Risks

| Risk | Severity | Impact |
|------|----------|--------|
| **Add to Cart button locator pattern**: Uses product slug in data-test ID (`add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack`). Different products = different locator IDs. | High | Generic product interaction requires dynamic slug generation or index-based lookup |
| **Same data-test on inventory and cart**: Both use `[data-test='inventory-item']` and `[data-test='inventory-item-name']`. Page context scope critical. | Medium | Locators must be scoped within correct page container to avoid ambiguity |
| **Cart badge timing**: Badge DOM structure not provided. Unknown if badge updates asynchronously or appears/disappears. | Medium | Cart verification may require explicit wait for badge state change |
| **Headless browser compatibility**: All verified locators use data-test attributes (stable) and visible text. | Low | No CSS pseudo-elements or style-dependent selectors identified |
| **Product inventory volatility**: Test depends on "Sauce Labs Backpack" existing in inventory. | Low | Product name should be parameterized via TestData |

---

## Questions for Developer Agent

- Should product lookup use visible text name, or should a generic product index be supported?
- Should cart operations (add/remove) support all products, or only specific products?
- Should cart badge be validated, or is it optional?

---

### Verified Facts

- Existing Page Objects identified
- Missing UI capabilities identified

- Wait requirements identified
- Risks identified

The Developer Agent should determine the implementation approach.
